title: The Disappearance of a Hiker: The Case of the Lost Olympic National Park

scenes.text: One hiker vanished without a trace in the wilderness.
The incident occurred in Olympic National Park, Washington State.
In 2006, a hiker named Chris disappeared during a solo trek.
Extensive searches found no sign of him, raising many questions.
scenes.label: NEVER FOUND

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 Olympic National Park, USA - 2006. Hiker Chris vanished during a solo trek, and extensive searches found no trace. Follow for daily cold cases!
